title: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam
tagline: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam, Kerala

overview.short: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam is a prominent Jacobite Syrian Orthodox church located atop a hill on the Muvattupuzha–Kothamangalam road, approximately three kilometers from Muvattupuzha in Kerala, India. The church holds significant historical, religious, and cultural importance in the Angamaly Diocese.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Mulavoor
topPlaces.description: Mulavoor is a village under Paipra Gram Panchayat in Muvattupuzha, Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a semi-urban area in Muvattupuzha town.

topPlaces.name: Central Mahallu Juma Masjid
topPlaces.description: The Central Mahallu Juma Masjid (Hindi: सेंट्रल महल्लु जुमा मस्जिद, मूवाट्टुपुड़ा), also known as Central Mahallu Jama'ath, is a Shafi'i Sunni Friday mosque, located in Muvattupuzha, in the Ernakulam district of the state of Kerala, India. The mosque is located adjacent to the Kavumkara market.

topPlaces.name: Varappetty
topPlaces.description: Varappetty is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Varappetty is 7 km from Kothamangalam along Kothamangalam-Vazhakulam Road, 6 km from Muvattupuzha along Puthuppady-Oonnukal Road and 12 km from Vazhakulam in Ernakulam District.

topPlaces.name: Thodupuzha River
topPlaces.description: Thodupuzha River has its origins in the Thodupuzha Taluk in the Idukki district of Kerala, India, and is a tributary of the Muvattupuzha river. The river is one of the few in the state that does not become dry in the summer as the outflow from the Idukki hydro-electric project is drained into this river via Kanjar river.

topPlaces.name: Muvattupuzha
topPlaces.description: Muvattupuzha ([muʋɐːt̺ːupuɻɐ]) is a municipality in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. It is located 35 km (21.7 mi) east of the district headquarters in Thrikkakara and about 204 km (126.8 mi) north of the state capital Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Pezhakkappilly
topPlaces.description: Pezhakkappilly is a suburb of Muvattupuzha town in Ernakulam district, Kerala, India, to the northwest of the town of Muvattupuzha. Its main junctions are Paipra Kavala, Sabine Junction, Pallichirangara, and Pallipady.

topPlaces.name: Anikkad (Muvattupuzha)
topPlaces.description: Anikkad is a village in Ernakulam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is located near the Muvattupuzha town in Avoly Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Perumpalloor
topPlaces.description: Perumpalloor is a village 4 km southeast of Muvattupuzha in Ernakulam, Kerala, India. It is a small area in the Arakuzha panchayat of Muvattupuzha taluk on the banks of the Thodupuzha river.

items.note: Mulavoor is a village under Paipra Gram Panchayat in Muvattupuzha, Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a semi-urban area in Muvattupuzha town.

The Central Mahallu Juma Masjid (Hindi: सेंट्रल महल्लु जुमा मस्जिद, मूवाट्टुपुड़ा), also known as Central Mahallu Jama'ath, is a Shafi'i Sunni Friday mosque, located in Muvattupuzha, in the Ernakulam district of the state of Kerala, India. The mosque is located adjacent to the Kavumkara market.

Varappetty is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Varappetty is 7 km from Kothamangalam along Kothamangalam-Vazhakulam Road, 6 km from Muvattupuzha along Puthuppady-Oonnukal Road and 12 km from Vazhakulam in Ernakulam District.

Thodupuzha River has its origins in the Thodupuzha Taluk in the Idukki district of Kerala, India, and is a tributary of the Muvattupuzha river. The river is one of the few in the state that does not become dry in the summer as the outflow from the Idukki hydro-electric project is drained into this river via Kanjar river.

Muvattupuzha ([muʋɐːt̺ːupuɻɐ]) is a municipality in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. It is located 35 km (21.7 mi) east of the district headquarters in Thrikkakara and about 204 km (126.8 mi) north of the state capital Thiruvananthapuram.

Pezhakkappilly is a suburb of Muvattupuzha town in Ernakulam district, Kerala, India, to the northwest of the town of Muvattupuzha. Its main junctions are Paipra Kavala, Sabine Junction, Pallichirangara, and Pallipady.
Anikkad is a village in Ernakulam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is located near the Muvattupuzha town in Avoly Panchayat.
Perumpalloor is a village 4 km southeast of Muvattupuzha in Ernakulam, Kerala, India. It is a small area in the Arakuzha panchayat of Muvattupuzha taluk on the banks of the Thodupuzha river.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (27 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (34 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Cathedral Church, Karakunnam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mulavoor, Central Mahallu Juma Masjid, Varappetty, Thodupuzha River, Muvattupuzha.
